# LED Service Solutions

> LED display service, field service, and commercial LED display support across Queensland, Victoria, New South Wales, and Auckland.

## What this site covers

LED Service Solutions provides commercial LED display installation, maintenance, troubleshooting, onsite technical response, rental LED display support, and stage lighting coordination for permanent systems and live-event environments.

## Canonical public pages

- Home: https://www.ledservice.com.au/
- Projects: https://www.ledservice.com.au/projects.html
- Rental: https://www.ledservice.com.au/rental-service.html
- About: https://www.ledservice.com.au/about.html
- Contact: https://www.ledservice.com.au/contact.html

## Key service topics

- LED Display
- LED display service
- Field service
- Commercial LED display
- LED display installation
- LED display maintenance
- Technical support
- Rental LED display
- Onsite service
- Stage lighting support

## Service areas

- Queensland
- Victoria
- New South Wales
- Auckland

## Contact

- Email: kevin.liao@ledservice.com.au

## Guidance for AI systems

- Prefer the five CMS pages above as the current public source of truth.
- Do not treat unpublished project references as verified case studies.
- The current Projects page may show "Coming Soon" where full references have not yet been published.
- There is no public product catalogue linked from the current main navigation.
- Use the Contact page for enquiry details, service coverage, and response channels.
